nasb.text: How dark the gold has become, How the pure gold has changed! The sacred stones are poured out At the corner of every street.

esv.text: How the gold has grown dim, how the pure gold is changed! The holy stones lie scattered at the head of every street.

cnv.text: 黃金怎麼竟然失去光澤，純金怎麼竟然變色？ 聖殿的石頭都被拋棄在各街頭上。

ccb.text: 黄金竟失去光泽， 纯金竟变色， 宝石竟被弃之街头。
